label: MAVLink AI - 20 Parachute (safety-gated)
info: WARNING — safety-critical example (issue #51). MAV_CMD_DO_PARACHUTE with action RELEASE (2) fires the parachute and typically stops the motors: releasing at the wrong moment destroys the vehicle. Most vehicles have no parachute at all — this is an example pattern, not a preset. The gate function refuses to pass RELEASE unless msg.payload.i_understand_release === true, and the output is Debug-wired only.

name: Release confirmation gate
